result.stdout:
Markdocs command line tool

USAGE
   markdocs  [OPTIONS] COMMAND

OPTIONS
   --cache <value> Path to cache directory           
   -q, --quiet     Enable quiet output               
   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output (repeatable)
   --version       Display version number            
   -h, --help      Print help and exit               

COMMANDS
   build     Generate static website from documentation
   lint      Run a linter on a documentation           
   serve     Serve website from directory              
   serve-git Serve website from git repository         
   help      Print help and exit

Markdocs command line tool

USAGE
   markdocs  [OPTIONS] COMMAND

OPTIONS
   --cache <value> Path to cache directory           
   -q, --quiet     Enable quiet output               
   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output (repeatable)
   --version       Display version number            
   -h, --help      Print help and exit               

COMMANDS
   build     Generate static website from documentation
   lint      Run a linter on a documentation           
   serve     Serve website from directory              
   serve-git Serve website from git repository         
   help      Print help and exit

result.stdout:
Generate static website from documentation

USAGE
   markdocs build [OPTIONS] PATH

GLOBAL OPTIONS
   --cache <value> Path to cache directory           
   -q, --quiet     Enable quiet output               
   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output (repeatable)
   --version       Display version number            
   -h, --help      Print help and exit               

OPTIONS
   -o, --output <value>   Path to output directory
   -t, --template <value> Template name           

ARGUMENTS
   PATH Path to documentation root directory (required, default .)

Print help and exit

USAGE
   markdocs help [OPTIONS] [COMMAND...]

GLOBAL OPTIONS
   --cache <value> Path to cache directory           
   -q, --quiet     Enable quiet output               
   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output (repeatable)
   --version       Display version number            
   -h, --help      Print help and exit               

ARGUMENTS
   COMMAND Command name (repeatable)

result.stdout:
Run a linter on a documentation

USAGE
   markdocs lint [OPTIONS] PATH

GLOBAL OPTIONS
   --cache <value> Path to cache directory           
   -q, --quiet     Enable quiet output               
   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output (repeatable)
   --version       Display version number            
   -h, --help      Print help and exit               

OPTIONS
   -s, --summary Display summary

ARGUMENTS
   PATH Path to documentation root directory (required, default .)

Run a linter on a documentation

USAGE
   markdocs lint [OPTIONS] PATH

GLOBAL OPTIONS
   --cache <value> Path to cache directory           
   -q, --quiet     Enable quiet output               
   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output (repeatable)

   -h, --help      Print help and exit

result.stdout:
Serve website from directory

USAGE
   markdocs serve [OPTIONS] PATH

GLOBAL OPTIONS
   --cache <value> Path to cache directory           
   -q, --quiet     Enable quiet output               
   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output (repeatable)
   --version       Display version number            
   -h, --help      Print help and exit               

OPTIONS
   -d, --dev            Enable developer mode                                  
   --listen-url <value> HTTP endpoint to listen (required, default http://0.0.0
                        .0:8000)                                               
   --public-url <value> Public root URL                                        
   --theme <value>      Color theme (valid values Light/Dark/Sketch, default Li
                        ght)                                                   

ARGUMENTS
   PATH Path to source directory (required, default .)

commands.payload:
Serve website from directory

USAGE

GLOBAL OPTIONS
   --cache <value> Path to cache directory           
   -q, --quiet     Enable quiet output               
   -v, --verbose   Enable verbose output (repeatable)
   --version       Display version number            
   -h, --help      Print help and exit               

OPTIONS

   --listen-url <value> HTTP endpoint to listen (required, default http://0.0.0
                        .0:8000)                                               
   --public-url <value> Public root URL                                        
   --theme <value>      Color theme (valid values Light/Dark/Sketch, default Li
                        ght)                                                   

ARGUMENTS
   PATH Path to source directory (required, default .)
